zh.Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼
zh.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford是Hugh Ewing Crawford的女兒，於1585年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。她於大約1609年與Gavin Blair在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年9月10日在她的家鄉享年25歲。

zh-hans.Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland: 苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford是Hugh Ewing Crawford的女儿，于1585年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。她于大约1609年与Gavin Blair在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年9月10日在她的家乡享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford was born in 1585, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland as the daughter of Hugh Ewing Crawford. She married Gavin Blair about 1609, in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 10 September 1610, in her hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford est née en 1585, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse, fille de Hugh Ewing Crawford. Elle a épousé Gavin Blair environ 1609, à Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1610, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford wurde 1585 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Hugh Ewing Crawford geboren. Sie hat um 1609 in Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland Gavin Blair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1610 im Alter von 25 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford è nata il nel 1585 nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland come figlia di Hugh Ewing Crawford. Lei sposato Gavin Blair circa 1609, nel Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1610, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.of Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニー
ja.Auldmuir, Blair, Ayrshire,Scotland: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawfordは1585年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでHugh Ewing Crawfordの娘として生まれた。約1609年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルバーニーでGavin Blairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年9月10日に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford(은)는 1585년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Hugh Ewing Crawford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1609년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬비른이에서 Gavin Blair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 9월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford nasceu em 1585, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland filha de Hugh Ewing Crawford. Ela casou-se com Gavin Blair aproximadamente 1609, em Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1610, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford родилась в 1585 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Hugh Ewing Crawford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gavin Blair около 1609 г. в местности килбирни, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1610 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel Crawford nació en 1585, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland como hija de Hugh Ewing Crawford. Se casó con Gavin Blair aproximadamente 1609, en Kilbirnie, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1610, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.
